requirement_topic.en: BSTI Scope Screening and IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: BSTI适用范围筛查及IEC 62619 / IEC 62933证据
requirement_topic.zht: BSTI適用範圍篩查及IEC 62619 / IEC 62933證據

summary.en: BSTI is Bangladesh's national standards and conformity-assessment authority. Public official sources should be checked for the exact HS code, product family, and component list because a lithium BESS as a complete assembled system is not clearly established as a blanket mandatory BSTI certification item from public sources. IEC 62619:2022 battery evidence and IEC 62933 electrical energy storage system evidence may be requested by the importer, tender, owner, insurer, utility, inspection body, or a confirmed Bangladesh Standards route.
summary.zh: BSTI是孟加拉国国家标准和合格评定主管机构。应按具体HS编码、产品族和部件清单核查公开官方资料，因为公开资料未能清楚表明锂电BESS整套系统属于一揽子强制BSTI认证产品。IEC 62619:2022电池证据和IEC 62933电能储能系统证据可能由进口商、招标方、业主、保险方、电网公司、检验机构或已确认的孟加拉国标准路径要求。
summary.zht: BSTI是孟加拉國國家標準和合格評定主管機構。應按具體HS編碼、產品族和部件清單核查公開官方資料，因為公開資料未能清楚表明鋰電BESS整套系統屬於一攬子強制BSTI認證產品。IEC 62619:2022電池證據和IEC 62933電能儲能系統證據可能由進口商、招標方、業主、保險方、電網公司、檢驗機構或已確認的孟加拉國標準路徑要求。

standards_or_laws: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution Act, 2018
BSTI certification or import route where the exact product or component is in scope

IEC 62933 series where requested (a BDS EN IEC 62933-4-3 adoption by BSTI has been reported in industry sources but was not confirmed from official Bangladesh government sources at time of review — verify with BSTI before relying on any specific BDS edition or mandatory effective date)

summary.en: China GB evidence under GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and GB/T 36558-2023 can support the technical file, but it does not prove BSTI certification, Bangladesh Standards adoption, or acceptance for the exact shipment unless the Bangladesh route confirms it.
summary.zh: GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023项下的中国GB证据可支持技术资料，但除非孟加拉国路径确认，不能证明BSTI认证、孟加拉国采标或对具体货批的接受性。
summary.zht: GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023項下的中國GB證據可支持技術資料，但除非孟加拉國路徑確認，不能證明BSTI認證、孟加拉國採標或對具體貨批的接受性。

gap.en: Obtain written route confirmation before shipment: whether Bangladesh requires a BSTI certificate, Bangladesh Standard evidence, direct IEC report, clause-mapped China GB report, recognized-lab report, or only project due-diligence documents.
gap.zh: 出货前应取得书面路径确认：孟加拉国是否要求BSTI证书、孟加拉国标准证据、直接IEC报告、条款映射后的中国GB报告、认可实验室报告，还是仅需项目尽调文件。
gap.zht: 出貨前應取得書面路徑確認：孟加拉國是否要求BSTI證書、孟加拉國標準證據、直接IEC報告、條款映射後的中國GB報告、認可實驗室報告，還是僅需項目盡調文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the exact BESS, component, HS code, import route, tender, contract, inspection body, utility, or authority decision places it in BSTI or Bangladesh Standards scope; otherwise IEC evidence is normally project or due-diligence evidence
mandatory_status.cn: China GB evidence may be mandatory or recommended depending on the exact China standard and product scope; it remains China-side evidence unless Bangladesh accepts it

source.publisher: Legislative and Parliamentary Affairs Division, Government of Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat BSTI as a scope-confirmation gate, not as an assumed blanket BESS approval. Confirm whether IEC 62619:2022, IEC 62933, or mapped China GB evidence is accepted for the exact Bangladesh route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将BSTI作为适用范围确认关口，而不是假定存在一揽子BESS批准。应确认IEC 62619:2022、IEC 62933或映射后的中国GB证据是否被具体孟加拉国路径接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將BSTI作為適用範圍確認關口，而不是假定存在一攬子BESS批准。應確認IEC 62619:2022、IEC 62933或映射後的中國GB證據是否被具體孟加拉國路徑接受。
